Notice And Motion To Strike Portions Of The Complaint
Off Calendar Aug-08-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT IRINA NITKO'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF THE COMPLAINT is denied. The complaint alleges conduct that supports the punitive damages claim. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/PJM/PB) Judge: Patrick Mahoney; Reporter: Joe Vickstein, CSR #4780
